recommendations.overview: After his estranged son gets embroiled in a Nazi plot, self-exiled gangster Tommy Shelby must return to Birmingham to save his family — and his nation.

recommendations.title: Wild Rose
recommendations.overview: A young Scottish singer, Rose-Lynn Harlan, dreams of making it as a country artist in Nashville after being released from prison.

recommendations.overview: 40 years after the first haunting at Eel Marsh House, a group of children evacuated from WWII London arrive, awakening the house's darkest inhabitant.

recommendations.title: Headhunters
recommendations.overview: An accomplished headhunter risks everything to obtain a valuable painting owned by a former mercenary.

recommendations.title: Section 8
recommendations.overview: After avenging the murder of his family, a former soldier is sprung from prison and recruited by a shadowy government agency.

recommendations.title: The Gray Man
recommendations.overview: When a shadowy CIA agent uncovers damning agency secrets, he's hunted across the globe by a sociopathic rogue operative who's put a bounty on his head.

recommendations.overview: A young teenage werewolf is torn between honoring her family's secret and her love for a man.
